note: This is a research map only. No hypotheses defined here. No validation performed.

feature_families.name: Cross-Sectional Relative Strength
feature_families.description: Ranking symbols by relative performance within a universe or sector
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Relative strength is a documented anomaly - winners tend to persist short-term. Cross-sectional ranking removes market-wide drift and isolates stock-specific signal.
feature_families.required_data_source: StockQuote (exists), sector metadata (partially exists in Stock.industry but mostly empty)
feature_families.pit_risk: LOW - rankings computed from available historical prices only
feature_families.expected_signal_density: HIGH - all symbols get a rank at each date
feature_families.recommended_next_action: P4-02 Cross-Sectional Ranking Framework - build universe rank from existing StockQuote data first, then add sector rank when industry metadata is populated

feature_families.name: Market Regime
feature_families.description: Classifying overall market state to condition hypotheses
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Strategy performance varies significantly by market regime. Bull-regime momentum and bear-regime reversal are well-documented. Regime-blind hypotheses suffer from averaging across very different conditions.
feature_families.required_data_source: MarketIndex table (EXISTS - TAIEX and sector indices, 2900 rows, 2017-2026)
feature_families.pit_risk: LOW - index values are published contemporaneously
feature_families.expected_signal_density: MEDIUM - regime changes less frequently than price signals
feature_families.recommended_next_action: P4-03 Market Regime Classifier - build TAIEX-based regime model from existing MarketIndex data

feature_families.name: Liquidity and Volume Regime
feature_families.description: Filtering signals by liquidity quality and volume persistence
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Illiquid signals cannot be executed. Persistent abnormal volume is more meaningful than single-day spikes. Liquidity filtering removes false signals.
feature_families.required_data_source: StockQuote volume (EXISTS), capital/shares from Stock table (partially exists)
feature_families.recommended_next_action: Compute volume-based liquidity metrics from existing StockQuote data. Enhance with capital data if Stock.capital is populated.

feature_families.name: Institutional and Flow Data
feature_families.description: Foreign investor, investment trust, dealer, and margin flows
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Foreign institutional investors have information advantages and their sustained buying predicts price appreciation. Trust fund flows reflect fundamental-based demand.
feature_families.current_availability: EXISTS - but only 1 year of history (2025-2026), insufficient for robust backtesting
feature_families.pit_risk: LOW - institutional data published next trading day
feature_families.recommended_next_action: P4-01 Data Audit - confirm historical depth. Only 1 year of institutional data may be insufficient for 500d window testing. Backfill required.
feature_families.blocker: InstitutionalChip only covers 2025-05-02 to 2026-05-05. Need historical data for at least 2022-2026 for robust validation.

feature_families.name: Corporate Event Context
feature_families.description: Using earnings, dividends, monthly revenue, and ex-right events as conditioning
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Corporate events create predictable price reactions. Revenue surprises and earnings beats have well-documented price drift. Ex-dividend effects are mechanical.
feature_families.required_data_source: MonthlyRevenue (EXISTS - 2143 rows, 1074 symbols, but only 2026-02 to 2026-03), FinancialReport (EXISTS - 957 rows, limited quarters)
feature_families.pit_risk: MEDIUM - revenue announced after period end, must use announcement date not report period
feature_families.recommended_next_action: P4-01 Data Audit - MonthlyRevenue and FinancialReport have very limited history. Need multi-year backfill before hypothesis design.
feature_families.blocker: MonthlyRevenue only has 2026-02 to 2026-03. Historical backfill critical.

feature_families.name: Risk Management Features
feature_families.description: Downside risk metrics for position sizing and signal filtering
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Risk-adjusted signals have better Sharpe. Position sizing by volatility targeting reduces left tail. Stop-loss levels define acceptable risk before entry.
feature_families.required_data_source: StockQuote (EXISTS - sufficient for computing historical volatility and drawdown)
feature_families.pit_risk: LOW - historical volatility computed from past prices only
feature_families.expected_signal_density: N/A - these are filters and sizing tools, not signals
feature_families.recommended_next_action: Incorporate into all next-gen hypothesis designs as standard filters. Not a standalone hypothesis family.

feature_families.name: Portfolio-Level Hypotheses
feature_families.description: Basket-level signals rather than single-stock signals
feature_families.expected_economic_rationale: Portfolio-level signals average out idiosyncratic noise. Cross-sectional ranking strategies have stronger statistical power than single-stock tests. Sector-neutral removes industry-wide momentum.
feature_families.pit_risk: LOW - rankings computed from available data
feature_families.recommended_next_action: P4-04 Portfolio-Level Backtester - build basket validation framework. This represents the next qualitative leap from single-stock testing.

priority_ranking.name: Market Regime
priority_ranking.reason: Data exists now (TAIEX). Can be built immediately in P4-03.

priority_ranking.name: Cross-Sectional Relative Strength
priority_ranking.reason: Data exists (StockQuote). High signal density. Well-documented anomaly.

priority_ranking.name: Portfolio-Level Hypotheses
priority_ranking.reason: Higher statistical power than single-stock. Builds on FF-A ranking.

priority_ranking.name: Institutional Flow
priority_ranking.reason: Data exists but only 1 year. Need backfill. High potential.

priority_ranking.name: Liquidity and Volume Regime
priority_ranking.reason: Computable from existing data. Useful as filter.

priority_ranking.name: Risk Management Features
priority_ranking.reason: Computable from existing data. Should be standard filter in all hypotheses.

priority_ranking.name: Corporate Event Context
priority_ranking.reason: Limited history. Need major backfill before usable.
